title: Edison International (EIX) to Gain From Long-term Investments
text: Edison International's (EIX) strategic investment plans to further improve infrastructure and favorable regulatory outcomes are likely to drive its performance.

title: Play Defense: 2 High-Yield Preferreds For A Reliable Income
text: Utility stocks bring a blend of safety and stability and a haven of consistent returns. Regulated utilities have a solid moat and pricing power that only a few industries can match. Two solid utility preferreds to accelerate your retirement goals.
